what_it_does: This JSON file is a batch allocation manifest: it lists six files from the claude-ds project that are assigned to interpretive wave-002, allocation batch-015, giving each file's project name, relative path, and repository root.
observations: All six entries share the same project 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
Five entries live under assets/icons and include JS modules, a JSX component, and an index.html
One entry is 'atomicity/.gitkeep', an empty-directory placeholder outside the icons folder
The file declares no code symbols to interpret
standards: The presence of a .gitkeep file alongside icon assets
An 'index.html' file inside the icons directory, suggesting a gallery or preview page
The capitalized JSX component 'CvIcon.jsx' among lower-cased JS modules
conventions: Uses a uniform {project, path, root} triple for every allocated file
Follows a directory-based batching convention: wave-002/alloc/batch-015.json
concerns: The .gitkeep entry carries no design/code content to interpret
No symbols[] entries are provided, so the interpretive layer has no extracted symbols for this batch
notes: A small, scoped manifest that groups a handful of Claude design-system icon files plus an atomicity placeholder for wave-002 processing.
questions: What interpretive task is wave-002 intended to perform on these files?
Is atomicity/.gitkeep intentionally included as a structural marker or should it be excluded from interpretation?
What does assets/icons/index.html contain or reference?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated in the file, but its content matches the expected structure of an allocation manifest for downstream interpretation.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to carve out a small, traceable slice of the Claude design system so an interpretive pipeline can process it as a unit.
contribution: It contributes a precise, machine-readable list of file locations and project context that a fused system can use to locate and scope the same source files.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation manifest listing six claude-ds files under assets/icons and atomicity for interpretive wave-002 batch-015.
intention_for_embedding: To register a specific batch of design-system files for interpretation in wave-002 of the build-prep ledger.
